$comment: Pyxis M8a fixture — World Lobby (Omniverse Collected scene). Standalone: provides §34 KPI dims (1920x1080), pinned seed for repeatability, FIF=3 for §33.7 byte-equal contract. Scene path is supplied separately via --scene CLI so this fixture is reusable across other M8 scenes (ALAB / Moana etc.) without per-scene fixture proliferation.
